reasoning: I will vote TMC. Yes, I have heard the bad things about Sandeshkhali—serious things, I know this. But every party has corruption, this is how Bengal works. What matters is: Didi kept her word and stopped NRC when Delhi wanted to throw us out. She gives us the rice that feeds my children, the work programs when there is no field work. Shantanu Thakur is a minister now in Delhi, and Delhi is the one that painted us as ghuspaithiya. The ED harassing TMC leaders is just politics before the election—BJP's game. I have voted TMC since 2011 and I will vote TMC until I die. Didi protects us from Delhi's interference. That matters more.
primary_drivers: Protection from NRC/CAA—Mamata's promise that Delhi cannot force us to prove we belong in our own land
Material dependence on TMC welfare programs—the two-rupee rice and work schemes that keep my family alive
Deep distrust of BJP/Delhi—fear they see people like me as infiltrators, not citizens
